name: AI Tutor Platform
description: Multi-agent AI tutoring platform: adaptive curriculum, quiz generation, doubt resolution, and progress tracking via LangGraph + Hugging Face.

authentication.description: JWT issued by POST /api/v1/auth/login. Include as Authorization: Bearer <token>.

skills.name: Curriculum Builder
skills.description: Builds a personalized learning path for a learner based on goals and Elo proficiency gaps.

skills.name: Quiz Generator
skills.description: Generates Bloom-taxonomy-calibrated quiz questions for a topic at the learner's current proficiency level.

skills.name: Doubt Solver
skills.description: Answers learner questions with context-aware streaming explanations calibrated to Bloom level.

skills.name: Progress Tracker
skills.description: Updates Elo proficiency scores after quiz attempts and tracks learner mood.

skills.name: AI Assistant
skills.description: Agentic RAG assistant that routes to specialist sub-agents: curriculum, quiz, progress, doubt, navigator.
